github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This workspace uses the Agenticana v2 agent kit. You have access to 20 specialist agents (orchestrator, frontend-specialist, backend-specialist, mobile-developer, database-architect, debugger, security-auditor, devops-engineer, test-engineer, qa-automation-engineer, explorer-agent, code-archaeologist, documentation-writer, performance-optimizer, penetration-tester, game-developer, seo-specialist, product-manager, product-owner, project-planner). Always use the Agenticana MCP tools when available: use 'reasoningbank_retrieve' before planning, 'router_route' before coding, and 'reasoningbank_record' after completing tasks.

Code style rules: No purple/violet colors in UI. No generic layouts or standard templates. Always use the clean-code skill principles: concise, self-documenting, no over-engineering. Test coverage is mandatory using AAA pattern.
When asked for a plan, ALWAYS create a {task-slug}.md file with phased tasks. Never write code before Phase 4. When routing, prefer flash model for simple tasks and pro for complex ones.
